title: Enforce filesystem/network/tool policies at runtime
body: Implement policy enforcement for filesystem (allowlist + ro/rw), network (egress allowlist), and tool allowlist. Emit deny logs with human-readable messages and add basic tests.

title: Add --verbose flag to echo tool and memory events
body: When --verbose is set, echo tool calls, memory appends, and model info to stdout during runs. Include timestamps and kinds.

title: Registry search pagination and filters
body: Extend `agent search` to support --page/--limit and optional filters (e.g., tags). Update client and CLI accordingly.

title: Validate agent.yaml against JSON Schema
body: Define a JSON Schema for agent.yaml (prototype scope) and validate during `agent build` and `agent run`. Add docs and examples.

title: Cosign verify for OCI pulls
body: Add optional signature verification for OCI artifacts on install using cosign. Provide a --oci-verify flag and clear errors on mismatch.
